nodes.name: index_seg_codec.rs
nodes.summary: INDEX_SEG codec: reads and writes HNSW index segments (header, restart point index, varint delta-encoded adjacency).

nodes.name: IndexHeader
nodes.summary: Index header at the start of an INDEX_SEG payload (index_type, layer_level, m, ef_construction, node_count).

nodes.name: RestartPointIndex
nodes.summary: Restart point index for fast access into adjacency data.

nodes.name: NodeAdjacency
nodes.summary: A single node's adjacency information across HNSW layers.

nodes.name: write_index_seg
nodes.summary: Writes an INDEX_SEG payload from header, restart index, and adjacency data with varint delta encoding.

nodes.name: read_index_header
nodes.summary: Reads the INDEX_SEG header from the start of the payload.

nodes.name: read_restart_index
nodes.summary: Reads the restart point index from the payload at the given offset.

nodes.name: read_adjacency
nodes.summary: Reads adjacency data for node_count nodes from the payload using varint and delta decoding.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for rvf-wire: binary encoding/decoding for RVF segment headers, varints, hashes, tail scanning, and per-segment codecs.

nodes.name: manifest_codec.rs
nodes.summary: Codec for the Level-0 root manifest including CRC32C verification.

nodes.name: Level0Root
nodes.summary: Top-level root manifest structure of an RVF file.

nodes.name: read_root_manifest
nodes.summary: Reads and CRC32C-validates the root manifest from a byte slice.

nodes.name: write_root_manifest
nodes.summary: Encodes a Level0Root into the fixed-size manifest byte representation.

nodes.name: reader.rs
nodes.summary: Segment reader: parses segment headers, validates payloads against content hashes.

nodes.name: read_segment_header
nodes.summary: Parses a SegmentHeader from a byte slice.

nodes.name: validate_segment
nodes.summary: Validates a segment's payload by recomputing and comparing the content hash.

nodes.name: read_segment
nodes.summary: Reads a full segment (header + payload slice) from a byte buffer.

nodes.name: tail_scan.rs
nodes.summary: Tail scanner that locates the latest valid manifest at the end of an RVF file for crash recovery.

nodes.name: find_latest_manifest
nodes.summary: Scans backward through the file to find the latest valid manifest segment.

nodes.name: varint.rs
nodes.summary: LEB128-style varint encoding/decoding utilities used across RVF codecs.

nodes.name: encode_varint
nodes.summary: Encodes a u64 as varint into a buffer; returns number of bytes written.

nodes.name: decode_varint
nodes.summary: Decodes a varint from a buffer; returns the value and bytes consumed.

nodes.name: varint_size
nodes.summary: Computes the encoded length of a u64 as a varint.

nodes.name: vec_seg_codec.rs
nodes.summary: Codec for VEC_SEG vector segments: block directory and per-block vector data.

nodes.name: BlockDirEntry
nodes.summary: Block directory entry describing offset, count, and dtype of a vector block.

nodes.name: BlockDirectory
nodes.summary: Top-level directory of vector blocks within a VEC_SEG.

nodes.name: VecBlock
nodes.summary: Vector block payload with dtype, dimension, and raw bytes.

nodes.name: read_block_directory
nodes.summary: Reads a VEC_SEG block directory from the payload.

nodes.name: write_block_directory
nodes.summary: Encodes a block directory with the given entries.

nodes.name: write_vec_block
nodes.summary: Writes a single vector block with delta-encoded payload and CRC32C.

nodes.name: read_vec_block
nodes.summary: Reads a vector block referenced by a BlockDirEntry.

nodes.name: writer.rs
nodes.summary: Segment writer: pads payloads, computes content hashes, emits full segments.

nodes.name: calculate_padded_size
nodes.summary: Computes 64-byte aligned padded size for a segment header+payload.

nodes.name: write_segment
nodes.summary: Writes a complete segment (header + hashed payload) to a buffer.

nodes.name: write_segment_with_algo
nodes.summary: Like write_segment but lets the caller select a specific hash algorithm.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for rvf-integration-tests: aggregates all RVF crates and ed25519/tempfile/rand for end-to-end testing.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Empty library root for the rvf-integration-tests crate; all tests live under tests/.

nodes.name: attestation_witness.rs
nodes.summary: Attestation system integration tests: record encode/decode, witness chain integrity, tamper detection, TEE-bound keys.

nodes.name: attestation_record_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips an attestation record through encode/decode.

nodes.name: attestation_witness_chain_integrity
nodes.summary: Verifies an attestation witness chain is intact end-to-end.

nodes.name: attestation_witness_tamper_detection
nodes.summary: Ensures witness chain verification fails when any link is tampered with.

nodes.name: tee_bound_key_lifecycle
nodes.summary: Encodes/decodes TEE-bound keys and verifies key binding.

nodes.name: attested_segment_flag
nodes.summary: Validates the attested segment flag is honored on segment headers.

nodes.name: mixed_witness_types_in_chain
nodes.summary: Verifies a chain containing mixed witness entry types verifies correctly.

nodes.name: bit_flip_detection.rs
nodes.summary: Bit-flip detection tests proving the hash/CRC catches random corruption per acceptance spec section 4.

nodes.name: single_bit_flip_in_payload_detected
nodes.summary: Single-bit payload flip is detected by validation.

nodes.name: multi_bit_corruption_detected
nodes.summary: Multi-bit corruption is detected.

nodes.name: corruption_in_one_segment_does_not_affect_another
nodes.summary: Corruption is isolated to a single segment.

nodes.name: header_magic_corruption_detected
nodes.summary: Corruption of the segment header magic is detected.

nodes.name: zero_payload_hash_is_valid
nodes.summary: Empty payload validates with the expected content hash.

nodes.name: computational_container.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for KERNEL_SEG (0x0E) and EBPF_SEG (0x0F) computational container segments.

nodes.name: kernel_header_round_trip
nodes.summary: KernelHeader 128-byte payload round-trips through write/read.

nodes.name: ebpf_header_round_trip
nodes.summary: EbpfHeader 64-byte payload round-trips through write/read.

nodes.name: kernel_segment_survives_store_reopen
nodes.summary: Kernel segment persists across RvfStore close and reopen.

nodes.name: multi_arch_kernel_segments
nodes.summary: Multiple architecture kernel segments coexist in one store.

nodes.name: kernel_image_hash_verification
nodes.summary: Kernel image hash is verified on read.

nodes.name: kernel_flags_validation
nodes.summary: Kernel header flags are validated.

nodes.name: ebpf_max_dimension_check
nodes.summary: eBPF program max dimension check is enforced.

nodes.name: test_stub_kernel_type
nodes.summary: Verifies behavior of stub kernel type slot.

nodes.name: cow_benchmarks.rs
nodes.summary: Performance benchmarks for the RVCOW subsystem (all ignored by default; run with --ignored).

nodes.name: bench_cow_branch_creation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks creation of COW branches.

nodes.name: bench_cow_read_latency
nodes.summary: Benchmarks COW read latency.

nodes.name: bench_cow_write_coalescing
nodes.summary: Benchmarks COW write coalescing.

nodes.name: bench_cowmap_lookup
nodes.summary: Benchmarks COW map lookup performance.

nodes.name: bench_membership_contains
nodes.summary: Benchmarks membership filter contains queries.

nodes.name: bench_membership_serialization
nodes.summary: Benchmarks membership filter serialization.

nodes.name: bench_freeze_operation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks COW freeze operation.

nodes.name: bench_cowmap_serialization
nodes.summary: Benchmarks COW map serialization.

nodes.name: bench_adr031_acceptance
nodes.summary: Runs the ADR-031 acceptance benchmark.

nodes.name: cow_branching.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the RVF COW branching system: branch creation, inheritance, COW stats, parent immutability.

nodes.name: basic_branch_creation
nodes.summary: Creates a COW branch and verifies basic structure.

nodes.name: branch_inherits_vectors_via_query
nodes.summary: A branch inherits parent vectors when queried.

nodes.name: cow_stats_reflect_local_and_inherited
nodes.summary: COW stats reflect both local and inherited vectors.

nodes.name: parent_unmodified_after_branch
nodes.summary: Parent store is unmodified after a child is branched off.

nodes.name: child_size_smaller_than_parent
nodes.summary: Child store on disk is smaller than the parent.

nodes.name: freeze_prevents_further_writes
nodes.summary: Freezing a branch prevents further writes.

nodes.name: derive_creates_lineage
nodes.summary: Deriving a branch records lineage metadata.

nodes.name: branch_membership_filter_excludes_deleted
nodes.summary: Membership filter in a branch excludes vectors deleted from the parent's view.

nodes.name: cow_crash_recovery.rs
nodes.summary: Tests recovery from torn writes, truncated files, and crash scenarios by falling back to earlier valid manifests.

nodes.name: store_survives_garbage_appended
nodes.summary: Store opens correctly after garbage bytes are appended to the file.

nodes.name: truncated_file_preserves_early_manifest
nodes.summary: Truncating the file falls back to the prior valid manifest.

nodes.name: multiple_manifests_last_wins
nodes.summary: With multiple manifests, the latest valid one is selected.

nodes.name: corrupted_trailing_bytes_dont_break_store
nodes.summary: Corrupted trailing bytes do not break store open.

nodes.name: reopened_store_preserves_all_data
nodes.summary: Reopening a store preserves all written data.

nodes.name: deletion_persists_through_reopen
nodes.summary: Deletions are preserved across close/reopen.

nodes.name: cross_platform_compat.rs
nodes.summary: Cross-platform compatibility tests: bytes round-trip, all distance metrics, header preservation.

nodes.name: cross_platform_cosine_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips a cosine-metric store across simulated platform boundaries.

nodes.name: cross_platform_l2_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips an L2-metric store across platforms.

nodes.name: cross_platform_inner_product_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips an inner-product store across platforms.

nodes.name: cross_platform_segment_headers_preserved
nodes.summary: Segment headers are byte-identical after platform round-trip.

nodes.name: cross_platform_all_metrics_consistent
nodes.summary: All metrics yield consistent results post round-trip.

nodes.name: cross_platform_byte_identical_transfer
nodes.summary: Bytes are identical after a platform boundary transfer.

nodes.name: crypto_sign_verify.rs
nodes.summary: Crypto integration tests: SHAKE-256 hashing, Ed25519 segment sign/verify, witness chains.

nodes.name: shake256_hash_deterministic
nodes.summary: SHAKE-256 hashing is deterministic.

nodes.name: shake256_different_inputs_different_hashes
nodes.summary: Distinct inputs hash to distinct values.

nodes.name: shake256_128_is_prefix_of_256
nodes.summary: shake256_128 output is the prefix of shake256_256.

nodes.name: sign_and_verify_segment_ed25519
nodes.summary: Round-trips an Ed25519 segment signature.

nodes.name: verify_fails_on_corrupted_payload
nodes.summary: Signature verify fails when the payload is corrupted.

nodes.name: verify_fails_on_wrong_key
nodes.summary: Signature verify fails with the wrong key.

nodes.name: verify_fails_on_tampered_header
nodes.summary: Signature verify fails when the header is tampered with.

nodes.name: witness_chain_create_and_verify
nodes.summary: Creates and verifies a witness chain end-to-end.

nodes.name: witness_chain_detects_tampering
nodes.summary: Witness chain verification detects tampering.

nodes.name: witness_chain_empty_is_valid
nodes.summary: Empty witness chain is treated as valid.

nodes.name: e2e_crash_safety.rs
nodes.summary: Crash safety tests: truncation, corrupt manifest checksums, partial segments; verifies recovery to last valid state.

nodes.name: crash_truncate_after_valid_state_recovers
nodes.summary: Truncating after a valid state lets the store recover.

nodes.name: crash_partial_segment_at_tail_is_harmless
nodes.summary: A partial segment at the tail does not corrupt the store.

nodes.name: crash_corrupted_manifest_checksum_fallback
nodes.summary: Corrupted manifest checksum triggers fallback to an earlier manifest.

nodes.name: crash_zero_fill_tail_detected
nodes.summary: Zero-filled tail bytes are detected.

nodes.name: crash_random_noise_appended_no_data_loss
nodes.summary: Random noise appended after the manifest causes no data loss.

nodes.name: crash_segment_hash_catches_corruption
nodes.summary: Segment content hash catches in-place corruption.

nodes.name: crash_corruption_isolated_to_single_segment
nodes.summary: Corruption is isolated to a single segment.

nodes.name: e2e_multi_segment.rs
nodes.summary: Multi-segment file tests: many VEC_SEGs, compaction merges, deletions across segments.

nodes.name: multi_seg_twenty_batches_all_queryable
nodes.summary: All twenty ingested batches remain queryable across many segments.

nodes.name: multi_seg_segment_count_increases
nodes.summary: Segment count increases with each ingest.

nodes.name: multi_seg_compact_merges_segments
nodes.summary: Compaction merges multiple VEC_SEGs into fewer segments.

nodes.name: multi_seg_delete_first_500_from_2000

nodes.name: multi_seg_compact_after_delete_verifies_remaining
nodes.summary: After delete + compact, only remaining vectors are visible.

nodes.name: multi_seg_double_compact
nodes.summary: Compaction is idempotent when run twice in succession.

nodes.name: multi_seg_reopen_preserves_all_batches
nodes.summary: Reopening a multi-segment store preserves every batch.

nodes.summary: Full progressive index achieves recall@k >= 0.90.

nodes.name: progressive_layer_a_only_returns_results
nodes.summary: Layer A alone returns query results.

nodes.name: progressive_recall_improves_with_more_layers
nodes.summary: Recall improves as more progressive layers are loaded.

nodes.name: progressive_recall_improves_with_ef_search
nodes.summary: Increasing ef_search improves recall as expected.

nodes.name: e2e_quantization_tiers.rs

nodes.name: quant_scalar_mse_below_threshold
nodes.summary: Scalar quantization reconstruction MSE stays below threshold.

nodes.summary: Scalar quantized k-NN reaches >= 0.90 recall.

nodes.summary: Product quantized k-NN reaches >= 0.80 recall.

nodes.name: quant_binary_screening_rerank_improves_recall
nodes.summary: Binary screening followed by rerank improves recall.

nodes.name: quant_sketch_tier_assignment_stable
nodes.summary: Count-Min Sketch tier assignments are stable across queries.

nodes.name: quant_scalar_compression_ratio
nodes.summary: Scalar quantization achieves the expected compression ratio.

nodes.name: quant_product_compression_ratio
nodes.summary: Product quantization achieves the expected compression ratio.

nodes.name: quant_binary_compression_ratio
nodes.summary: Binary quantization achieves the expected compression ratio.

nodes.name: quant_tier_labels_match_spec
nodes.summary: Quantization tier labels match the specification names.

nodes.name: lifecycle_multiple_ingest_delete_cycles
nodes.summary: Multiple ingest/delete cycles remain consistent.

nodes.name: lifecycle_high_dimension_384
